backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hero section, glassmorphism theme, tool grid, conversion modals) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summaries of four tool components: ImageToWord, ImageCompressor, ImageResizer, and MergePdfs, describing their conversion logic and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design token system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ConvertHub that loads Google Fonts (Inter/Poppins), CDN scripts for PDF.js, jsPDF, pdf-lib, and Mammoth.js, and mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages the active tool state, renders the layout (FloatingParticles, Hero, ToolGrid, Footer), and opens the selected tool inside a ConversionModal.
Modal dialog component with glassmorphism styling that wraps any tool's conversion UI, displaying a gradient title and a close button.
frontend/src/components/ConversionProgre: Progress indicator component showing a labeled percentage bar with a shimmer gradient animation and a spinning loader icon during file conversion.
frontend/src/components/DownloadButton.t: Button component that triggers a Blob download with a given filename, showing a checkmark icon when a result blob is available.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadZone.t: Drag-and-drop file upload zone component supporting single or multiple files, with visual drag-active state, a hidden file input fallback, and a list of selected files with removal support.
frontend/src/components/FloatingParticle: Renders an animated canvas background with floating, pulsing colored particles that wrap around screen edges and include a glow effect for larger particles.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays a site footer with brand info, a list of available tools, privacy guarantees, and a bottom bar with copyright and attribution links.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Renders the top hero section with the ConvertHub logo, app name, tagline, and decorative background glow orbs.
frontend/src/components/ToolCard.tsx: A styled, interactive button card for a single conversion tool that shows hover effects including glow, icon animation, and an arrow indicator.
frontend/src/components/ToolGrid.tsx: Defines all eight conversion tools with their metadata and renders them in a responsive grid of ToolCard components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated and anonymous identities and invalidating dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since all processing is client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a dark theme with neon accents, and provides reusable component classes like glass-card, gradient-text, and neon-glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/tools/ImageCompressor.tsx: A tool component that compresses an uploaded image using an HTML canvas with an adjustable quality slider, then provides the resulting JPEG blob for download along with size reduction stats.
frontend/src/tools/ImageResizer.tsx: A tool component that resizes an uploaded image to user-specified width and height dimensions (with optional aspect-ratio lock) via canvas, then offers the resized image for download.
frontend/src/tools/ImageToPdf.tsx: A tool component that converts one or more uploaded images into a multi-page PDF using jsPDF, supporting reordering of images before conversion and downloading the resulting PDF blob.
frontend/src/tools/ImageToWord.tsx: A tool component that embeds an uploaded image into a hand-crafted DOCX file (built from raw XML and ZIP structure) and provides it as a downloadable Word document.
frontend/src/tools/MergePdfs.tsx: React component that allows users to upload multiple PDF files, reorder them, and merge them into a single PDF using the pdf-lib library, with progress tracking and a download button for the result.
frontend/src/tools/PdfToImage.tsx: React component that converts each page of an uploaded PDF into JPEG or PNG images using pdf.js, displaying progress and offering individual or bulk download of the resulting images.
frontend/src/tools/PdfToWord.tsx: React component that extracts text from a PDF via pdf.js and packages it into a .docx file by manually constructing a ZIP-based OOXML document, then offers it for download.
frontend/src/tools/WordToPdf.tsx: React component that converts an uploaded DOCX file to PDF by parsing its HTML representation with mammoth.js and rendering the content into a jsPDF document for download.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), an extended color palette using oklch CSS variables, custom border radii, neon/glass box shadows, and includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata, 8 conversion tool features, UI/UX requirements, known issues, and CDN library choices (PDF.js, jsPDF, Canvas API) for the ConvertHub single-page application.
